reasoning_summary: Only game with confirmed lineups on Day 1. NYY elite lineup (Goldschmidt/Judge/Bellinger/Stanton) vs unknown SP Schlittler. Robbie Ray returning from TJS for SF. Market at -128 underprices NYY lineup advantage. Oracle Park, no adverse line movement.
Pinnacle line discrepancy: sharp books at 9.0 while Heritage still posted 8.5. Kikuchi vs Burrows in Minute Maid Park. ~2-3% implied probability edge vs Heritage price.
